heading: Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
label: 152909 Duty to maintain corporate and tax-exempt status
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)152909(a)36:2908(f)., , §§ 8(f), 16 (1st sentence), , 2913.Oct. 30, 1984Pub. L. 98–56198 Stat. 2911152909(b)36:2915 (1st sentence).
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)152909(a)36:2908(f)., , §§ 8(f), 16 (1st sentence), , 2913.Oct. 30, 1984Pub. L. 98–56198 Stat. 2911152909(b)36:2915 (1st sentence).

children.heading: .—Corporate Status
children.label: a .—Corporate Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as a corporation incorporated under the laws of each State in which it is incorporated.

children.heading: .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.label: b .—Tax-Exempt Status
children.text: The corporation shall maintain its status as an organization exempt from taxation under the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 ( et seq.).26 U.S.C. 1
